heading: Construction with other laws
label: 1838 Construction with other laws
text: Except as provided in section 1833(b), this chapter shall not be construed to preempt or displace any other remedies, whether civil or criminal, provided by United States Federal, State, commonwealth, possession, or territory law for the misappropriation of a trade secret, or to affect the otherwise lawful disclosure of information by any Government employee under (commonly known as the Freedom of Information Act).section 552 of title 5
notes: Amendments2016— substituted “Except as provided in section 1833(b), this chapter” for “This chapter”.Pub. L. 114–153
amendments: Amendments2016— substituted “Except as provided in section 1833(b), this chapter” for “This chapter”.Pub. L. 114–153
